originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'a' during its initialization is never read

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP false))
model:
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: b62bd7b261b.c L14: 'char *a = val' dead store. a is declared and assigned at L14 inside #ifdef MDEV_CONF / #ifdef MDEV_RENAME, but a is only used at L21 inside #ifdef MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP. When MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP=F, a is assigned but never read — genuine dead store. PC=MDEV_CONF AND MDEV_RENAME AND !MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP precisely captures this condition. No library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC.
